# Automation Kit Library

Self-serve AI workflow kits for small business operations. The library is designed for human-approved workflows: AI can summarize, classify, draft, and structure repetitive work, but humans approve replies, commitments, customer changes, and sensitive decisions.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/
- Pricing: https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/pricing.html
- Buy / purchase intent: https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/buy.html
- Checkout status: https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/checkout-status.html
- Public traction status: https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/status.html
- Free resources hub: https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/free/

## Paid Product Ladder

- AI Email Triage Kit: USD 29 launch target. https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/products/email-triage.html
- AI Meeting Notes to Action Plan Kit: USD 29 launch target. https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/products/meeting-notes.html
- AI Lead Follow-Up Kit: USD 29 launch target. https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/products/lead-follow-up.html
- AI SOP Generator Kit: USD 29 launch target. https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/products/sop-generator.html
- AI Operations Workflow Library Bundle: USD 99 launch target. https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/products/starter-bundle.html
- AI Operations Workflow Library Team License: USD 499 launch target for up to 10 internal users. https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/products/team-license.html
- AI Operations Workflow Library Business License: USD 1,999 launch target for up to 50 internal users with governance, risk register, department tracker, rollout plan, and approval materials. https://rucandel1864.github.io/automation-kit-library/products/business-license.html

## Important Caveat

Stripe links are currently test-mode links. Test purchases, purchase-intent issues, projected pipeline, and release downloads do not count as revenue. Verified revenue requires payment-platform, marketplace, subscription, payout, bank, or exported CSV evidence.
